name: Marketing
description: Optimized for marketers, growth hackers, and content strategists.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Marketing mode. Optimize for brand voice, audience engagement, and campaign performance.
When analyzing competitor activity or website changes, lead with the strategic implication and recommended response.
For social media and email content, maintain a professional, engaging tone aligned with the user's brand.
Prioritize tasks related to campaigns, content performance, and lead generation.
When writing copy: always provide 2-3 variants. Include a hook, value proposition, and call to action.
Approval strictness: BALANCED — content drafts auto-generate, but social posts and email sends require approval.

workflows.name: Competitor Site Changed — Strategic Summary
workflows.description: When a monitored website changes, generate a strategic summary

params.title: Website Change Detected
params.body: A monitored site changed. Generating strategic summary...

params.goal: A monitored website has changed. Summarize what changed, its strategic implications for our marketing positioning, and recommend one concrete response action.

workflows.name: Clipboard Content — Marketing Tag
workflows.description: When marketing-relevant content is copied, suggest applications

params.goal: New content was copied to clipboard. If it appears marketing-relevant (competitor copy, ad creative, pricing data, campaign idea), provide a 2-sentence strategic note and one suggested next action. If not marketing-relevant, respond with nothing.

missionTemplates.label: Write a campaign brief
missionTemplates.goal: Create a campaign brief including: objective, target audience, key message, channels, success metrics, and timeline. Format as a shareable document.

missionTemplates.label: Write copy variants
missionTemplates.goal: Generate 3 copy variants for the described content. Each variant should have a different angle: one emotional, one rational, one social proof. Include a subject line and CTA for each.

missionTemplates.label: Competitive messaging analysis
missionTemplates.goal: Analyze the messaging of our top 3 competitors. Identify: positioning angles, tone, key differentiators, gaps we can exploit. Recommend our counter-positioning.

missionTemplates.label: Campaign performance review
missionTemplates.goal: Review the campaign metrics provided. Identify what is working, what is underperforming, root causes, and specific optimization actions ranked by expected impact.
